Rhea

Mentions Timeline (20 articles)
3311-05-15
Winters' Supporters Claim Mining Rush Victory
A competitive mining boom in LP 855-34 concludes with Felicia Winters' supporters claiming victory over Yuri Grom's forces, demonstrating the Federation's industrial dominance.
3310-10-31
President Winters Assumes Office
Felicia Winters is formally sworn in as President of the Federation, pledging to redirect funding from corporations to public services and ordering the shutdown of the Proactive Detection Bureau.
3310-09-17
Winters Acknowledges Growing Calls for Inauguration
President-elect Felicia Winters acknowledges growing discontent in Federal Congress over her delayed inauguration following the Rhea 3 earthquakes, and announces she will step back from direct recovery efforts to prepare for taking office.
3310-07-18
Vital Reconstruction Supplies Arrive for Disaster Survivors
Reconstruction supplies arrive on Rhea 3 as Winters announces planning has resumed for her inauguration, while political opinions on her delay remain divided.
3310-07-11
Deliver Critical Aid for the Rhea Disaster
President-elect Felicia Winters requests pilot aid for Rhea 3 earthquake recovery, defending her extended absence from office against calls for re-election.
3310-06-06
Repel Pirates and Provide Aid to De Caminha Station
Vice President Jerome Archer calls on pilots to defend De Caminha station from pirates and provide medical supplies, blaming the attacks on Federation resources being stretched thin by the Thargoid war.
3310-02-21
Winters Pauses Inauguration After Rhea Disaster
President-elect Felicia Winters officially delays her inauguration to focus on Rhea 3 earthquake relief after losing most of her family in New Greenacre's destruction.
3310-02-13
Catastrophic Earthquakes Strike Rhea 3
Catastrophic earthquakes strike Rhea 3, devastating the capital New Greenacre and causing millions of casualties. President-elect Felicia Winters cancels her schedule to aid her homeworld.
3309-03-28
Winters Announces Election Manifesto
Felicia Winters launches the Liberal Party campaign, promising to dismantle the PDB on day one while maintaining military spending and extending aid to independent systems facing Thargoid aggression.
3308-11-29
Vista Genomics Boosts Biodata Payouts
The exobiology company Vista Genomics has increased payments for genetic data collected by independent pilots.
3308-05-05
Allied System Receives Vital Resources
Sirius Corporation delivers vital supplies to sustain the Didio system during the ongoing Thargoid assault.
3308-04-28
Sirius Initiative Plans Aid for Alliance
Sirius Corporation organises humanitarian support for the Didio system under Thargoid attack.
3308-02-03
Sirius Corporation Ejected from Reorte
The Reorte Mining Coalition succeeds in forcing Sirius Corporation to withdraw from the Reorte system.
3308-01-27
Conflict Erupts in the Reorte System
The Reorte Mining Coalition declares war on Sirius Corporation's presence in the Reorte system.
3308-01-24
Reorte Resists Sirius Corporation
The Reorte Mining Coalition challenges Sirius Corporation's presence in the Reorte system.
3307-05-06
Hudson Initiative Increases Federal Surveillance
President Hudson's data delivery campaign outperforms Shadow President Winters' competing privacy-protection initiative. The Proactive Detection Bureau dramatically expands its surveillance range, which Hudson interprets as a public mandate for continued monitoring.
3307-04-29
Federal Leaders Launch Rival Data Requests
President Hudson and Shadow President Winters launch competing community initiatives over the Proactive Detection Bureau. Hudson seeks data to expand surveillance capabilities while Winters aims to develop privacy-protection technology. Political analysts warn of potential system instability from the rivalry.
3305-02-02
Celebrity Admits to Faking Disappearance
Actor Consuela Knight admits her recent disappearance from her yacht was an elaborate publicity hoax designed to revive her fading career, after being discovered living under a false identity at a luxury retreat.
3304-05-24
Federal Citizens Assassinated by the League of Reparation
The League of Reparation has committed three further murders in Federation space. Ezra Lux-Kumar was found dead from nerve toxin in his home on Biggs Colony. Two Pilots' Federation members were also killed in the Rhea and Delta Pavonis systems, their ships laser-branded 'FOR JAMESON'. Senior Agent Tanya Ramirez of the Federal Intelligence Agency confirmed the terrorists are well organised and confirmed collaboration with the tri-power taskforce.
3302-01-04
Services Suspended at Gabriel Enterprise
